nasb.text: Then she went and sat down opposite him, about a bowshot away, for she said, “Do not let me see the boy die.” And she sat opposite him, and lifted up her voice and wept.

esv.text: Then she went and sat down opposite him a good way off, about the distance of a bowshot, for she said, “Let me not look on the death of the child.” And as she sat opposite him, she lifted up her voice and wept.

cnv.text: 然後自己走開，在離開約有一箭之遠的地方，相對而坐，說：“我不忍眼看孩子死去。”就相對坐著，放聲大哭。

ccb.text: 自己走到离孩子约一箭之远的地方，对着孩子坐下，说：“我不忍心看着他死啊！”夏甲坐在那里放声大哭起来。

csbs.text: 然后走开，坐在对面大约一箭远的地方，因为她想：“我不忍心看这孩子死去。”她坐在对面，放声大哭。
